cultural_significance: West Lake is one of the most famous and beautiful lakes in China, known for its natural beauty and cultural heritage. It has been a source of inspiration for poets, painters, and scholars for over a thousand years.
highlights: Leifeng Pagoda - Five-story塔 built in 975 AD
Broken Bridge - Famous for the legend of the White Snake
Su Causeway - Created by poet Su Shi during Song Dynasty
Lingyin Temple - One of the oldest temples in China

legends.title: Legend of the White Snake
legends.description: A love story between a white snake spirit and a human scholar, named Xu Xian, that took place around West Lake. The story has been adapted into many operas and films.

legends.title: Legend of the Broken Bridge
legends.description: Another tale connected to the White Snake legend, where the couple met on this bridge during a snowstorm.

famous_poems: The poem 'Spring River in the Flower Moon Night' by Zhang Ruoxu
Many poems by Su Shi, Bai Juyi, and other famous poets

visiting_info.famous_scenes: Three Pools Mirroring the Moon, Orioles Singing in the Willows, Lotus in the Breeze at Crooked Lake
